note: Mathlib/Topology/GDelta/Basic.lean:63 -- def IsGδ (s : Set X) : Prop := ∃ T : Set (Set X), (∀ t ∈ T, IsOpen t) ∧ T.Countable ∧ s = ⋂₀ T; docstring 'a set s is a Gδ set if it can be represented as an intersection of countably many open sets'. This IS the definition of the Gδ-set concept.
verify_note: Decl confirmed at Mathlib/Topology/GDelta/Basic.lean:63; Wikidata Q127244 label 'G δ set', desc 'countable intersection of open sets' matches IsGδ's def/docstring verbatim -- genuinely exact.
